text.title: QA Rollback Trigger Canon Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the decision-record artefact this methodology produces. Validator in scripts/validate-qa-rollback-trigger-canon.py enforces required keys, enum bounds, and pattern constraints.

section.title: Schema

example.note: All required keys present; enums and patterns satisfied.
Forbidden traits: signal not a metric path; threshold missing; window_minutes outside [2,15]; action not in enum; owner missing.
